hero.text: Believe in the magic of new beginnings.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today is a day for confidence. Take that leap you’ve been considering!
aries.love: Passion is in the air; open your heart to new possibilities.
aries.career: Opportunities will present themselves, so keep your eyes open.

taurus.general: Stability will guide your choices today; follow your instincts.
taurus.love: A romantic surprise is waiting just around the corner!
taurus.career: Be cautious about major decisions. Evaluate your options.

gemini.general: Curiosity will lead you to exciting discoveries today.
gemini.love: Communication is key; don’t shy away from expressing your feelings.
gemini.career: Collaboration will yield surprising results; unite forces with colleagues.

cancer.general: Emotional balance is essential; take time to recharge your spirit.
cancer.love: A heartfelt conversation can deepen your relationship significantly.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts in professional matters; they won't steer you wrong.

leo.general: Your charisma shines bright today; people will be drawn to you.
leo.love: Make time for your loved ones; your attention is needed.
leo.career: Take the lead on projects; your ideas will inspire others.

virgo.general: Organize your thoughts; clarity will come with structure.
virgo.love: A nurturing gesture will go a long way in your love life.
virgo.career: Pay attention to the details; they will make a significant difference.

libra.general: Balance is key; make sure to prioritize your personal well-being.
libra.love: A shared experience will bring you closer with a partner or friend.
libra.career: Look for partnerships; collaboration will enhance your success.

scorpio.general: Embrace transformation; change can lead to positive outcomes.
scorpio.love: Deep connections are favored today; explore them fully.
scorpio.career: Your focus will bring productivity; tackle challenging tasks first.

sagittarius.general: Adventure is calling; seize any chance to explore!
sagittarius.love: Your spontaneity will attract someone special; don’t hold back.
sagittarius.career: Innovative ideas will flourish; trust your creative instincts.

capricorn.general: Set practical goals today; your diligence will pay off.
capricorn.love: A solid foundation in your relationship will be reinforced.
capricorn.career: Hard work will lead to recognition; stay disciplined.

aquarius.general: Expect the unexpected; be open to surprises that inspire.
aquarius.love: Your uniqueness is attractive; embrace it in your interactions.
aquarius.career: Innovative solutions will come through brainstorming with others.

pisces.general: Intuition guides you today; trust your instincts.
pisces.love: Artistic expression can strengthen your relationships.
pisces.career: Your creativity shines in your work; don’t be afraid to showcase it.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: It's not about ideas. It's about making ideas happen.
professional.author: Scott Belsky

professional.text: Dream big, start small, act now.
professional.author: Robin Sharma

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
motivation.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: Every sunset is an opportunity to reset.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Be a voice, not an echo.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Life is a journey, not a destination.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Technological innovation is not just about fast computers; it's about changing the human experience.
tech.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me kit-tea memes.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Keep your faith in beautiful things; in the coming days, you will see miracles.
faith.author: Someone

faith.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
faith.author: Nelson Mandela

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
faith.author: Deepak Chopra

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

wisdom.text: In three words I can sum up everything I've learned about life: it goes on.
wisdom.author: Robert Frost

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The weak can never forgive. Forgiveness is the attribute of the strong.
wisdom.author: Mahatma Gandhi

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: It's not what you look at that matters, it's what you see.
wisdom.author: Henry David Thoreau
